projects.name: Geeky Web Dev
projects.description: A modern web development agency featuring full-stack services, smooth animations, responsive design, and built with cutting-edge web technologies. Showcases services including full-stack development, frontend and backend solutions, performance optimization, and SEO-friendly designs.

projects.name: Vasu Interio
projects.description: Designed and developed a modern website for Vasu Interio, showcasing their expertise in home interiors, modular kitchens, wardrobes, sofa upholstery, curtains, and blinds.

projects.name: Indowel
projects.description: Created an online catalog for Indowel to present their wide range of hardware accessories,hinges, tower bolts, screws, handles, and  curtain fittings.

projects.name: Shoppers
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, user authentication, and secure payment processing via PayPal integration.
